ddls:
CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "website_link" TEXT /* Link to the website */,
  "da" INTEGER /* Domain authority of the website */,
  "dr" INTEGER /* Domain rating of the website */,
  "spam_score" INTEGER /* Spam score of the website */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of website (e.g., Do-Follow, No-Follow) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the website was added to the directory */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the website's data was last updated */,
  "last_checked_at" TEXT /* Date and time the website was last checked for metrics */,
  "page_rank" INTEGER /* PageRank of the website */,
  "trust_flow" INTEGER /* Trust Flow of the website */,
  "citation_flow" INTEGER /* Citation Flow of the website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links associated with the website */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* JSON array of keywords the website is optimized for */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the website */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the website (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES website_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "website_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the website type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the website type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "website_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the metric belongs to */,
  "da" INTEGER /* Domain authority of the website on the given date */,
  "dr" INTEGER /* Domain rating of the website on the given date */,
  "spam_score" INTEGER /* Spam score of the website on the given date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "page_rank" INTEGER /* PageRank of the website on the given date */,
  "trust_flow" INTEGER /* Trust Flow of the website on the given date */,
  "citation_flow" INTEGER /* Citation Flow of the website on the given date */,
  "organic_traffic" INTEGER /* Organic traffic to the website on the given date */,
  "backlink_count" INTEGER /* Number of backlinks to the website on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_website_metrics_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backlinks" (
  "backlink_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backlink */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the backlink belongs to */,
  "referring_website" TEXT /* Link to the referring website */,
  "anchor_text" TEXT /* Anchor text of the backlink */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the backlink was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the backlink data was last updated */,
  "anchor_text_hashed" TEXT /* Hashed version of the anchor text for security */,
  "referring_website_hashed" TEXT /* Hashed version of the referring website for security */,
  "backlink_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the backlink (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backlink_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backlinks_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, client) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object for user preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the website */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the website was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the website */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* JSON array of user IDs the report was shared with */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
